2:186: O halde onlar da karşılık versinler
2:228: kur' (üç adet veya üç temizlik süresi)
4:3: you will be able to do justice
4:119: ve mutlaka onları boş kuruntulara sokacağım
6:8: respite would have been granted to them
8:29: iyi ile kötüyü ayırdedici bir anlayış
10:16: He (would) have made it known to you
11:88: as much as I am able
11:111: surely will pay them in full
12:94: you think me weakened in mind
14:34: you will (be able to) count them
16:59: he has been given good news
16:110: they had been put to trials
17:25: to those who often turn (to Him)
26:42: the ones who are brought near
33:16: you will be allowed to enjoy
35:13: (as much as) the membrane of a date-seed
35:37: We give you life long enough
42:16: response has been made to Him
42:21: Allah has given permission of it
43:20: we would not have worshipped them
55:35: you will (be able to) defend yourselves
56:70: then why are you not grateful
81:8: o diri diri toprağa gömülen kıza
